summary: Nearly flawless recording that feels like a nostalgic reunion, though a brief cut in “Shakedown Street” prevents perfection.
review: The reviewer praises the tape’s audio fidelity as almost five‑star quality, noting it surpasses many archive releases. The only criticism is a missing segment of “Shakedown Street,” but the overall sentiment remains overwhelmingly positive, likening the experience to meeting an old beloved girlfriend.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; it rates the recording very highly and gives a five‑star overall rating despite a minor cut, but provides little information on musical performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound described as close to 5‑star quality; very clear and well‑balanced. Noted a cut/missing segment in the middle of “Shakedown Street.”
